alert.description: Payment success rate critically below SLO

logs.message: Stripe API slow response: 2.3s for POST /v1/charges
Stripe API 429 Too Many Requests: retry_after=60s
Retry 1/3 for order_id=99001 (no backoff configured — immediate retry)
Stripe API 429 Too Many Requests (retry 1 failed immediately)
Retry 2/3 for order_id=99001 (no backoff — immediate retry)
Stripe API 429 Too Many Requests (retry 2 failed)
Retry 3/3 for order_id=99001 (final retry, no backoff)
All retries exhausted for order_id=99001 — payment FAILED
Stripe API rate limit cascade: 347 failed payments in 2 minutes, amplified by retry storm

root_cause: Promotional flash sale caused 30x payment request spike. Retry logic has no exponential backoff — each 429 triggers immediate retries, creating a retry storm that amplifies the rate limit violation.
